summary: Comprehensive testing of WebSocket Real-Time Notifications, Custom Domains Management, and Notification Center UI. All 27 backend tests passed. All frontend components render correctly with proper data-testid attributes. WebSocket connection establishes successfully and shows 'Live' status.
features_tested: GET /api/ws/status - WebSocket status endpoint returns connection stats ✓
WebSocket endpoint /api/ws/notifications - Accepts connections with token and workspace_id ✓
POST /api/domains - Add domain requires auth and workspace ✓
Frontend: Custom Domains page renders at /custom-domains ✓
Frontend: NotificationCenter component renders in header ✓
Frontend: EnterpriseSidebar includes Custom Domains link ✓
Frontend: Add Domain dialog with website selector and domain input ✓

websocket_status_api.description: GET /api/ws/status - Returns status, total_connections, active_users, active_workspaces

custom_domains_api.description: CRUD operations for custom domains with auth and workspace validation

ai_websites_api.description: GET /api/ai-websites returns list with deployment fields

domain_validation.description: Domain input strips http:// and www. prefixes

elements_verified: View Site link to deployed website
Empty state 'No Custom Domains' with Add Custom Domain button
Instructions card 'How to Set Up a Custom Domain' with 8 steps
Helper text 'Enter your domain without http:// or www.'
Empty state 'No notifications yet' with 'Real-time updates will appear here'

console_logs: WebSocket connected: Connected to notification service

seed_data_creation: Used existing test user and workspace from previous iterations. Deployed website 'Your Business' at https://innovatetech-ai.netlify.app available for domain testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features (WebSocket Real-Time Notifications, Custom Domains, Notification Center) are fully functional. WebSocket connection establishes on login and shows 'Live' status. Custom Domains page shows deployed websites and allows adding domains with DNS instructions. Previous iterations: iteration 6 had 39 tests for enterprise features (Team, A/B Testing, Automation, Analytics). This iteration adds 27 tests for WebSocket and Custom Domains features.
